description_long: This object is a rectangular lotion bottle with a translucent body that fades from a deep red at the top to a milky white at the bottom. The front face features a prominent cross-shaped indentation, and below it, a circular recessed area with a faint red marking. The bottle is topped with a faceted, semi-transparent cap that appears to be screw-on. The sides of the bottle are plain, with the color gradient continuing smoothly. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with the cross and circular features providing visual interest and possibly indicating a specialized or themed product.
description: A rectangular lotion bottle with a red-to-white gradient, a cross-shaped indentation on the front, and a faceted semi-transparent cap.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red-to-white gradient and the faceted cap, with no visible markings or features.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the cross-shaped indentation and the smooth color gradient, with the cap clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the gradient and cap without any markings.
description_view_3: Rear or alternate front view showing both the cross-shaped indentation and a circular recessed area with a faint red marking below it.
